title: MilkSplash
description: Lets players brew a throwable milk item to cleanse their potion effects! Configurable options such as remove negative potion effects only, only remove the thrower's potion effects, etc.
body:
# MilkSplash

MilkSplash is a fun plugin that allows players to brew a throwable milk splash potion. This potion will cleanse all potion effects to players/entities hit by it! There are a few configuration options listed below to change up how the item will work!

### Features:
- NEW!! Allows players to brew a milk potion and a throwable splash milk potion through a brewing stand!
- Allow players to craft a throwable milk potion
- Milk potion will act as a splash potion and cleanse effects that are on all players/entities hit by it
- Option to make potion only cleanse effects from the person that threw it
- Option to make potion only cleanse negative effects
- Ability to make it so there is a cooldown between throwing milk potions (configurable time)
- Enable/disable permissions for crafting and using potion
- Change permission and cooldown messages, item name, item lore, etc. in an easy config file!

### Brewing Recipe:
![Milk Splash Brewing Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/hGV0zuU.png)

### Crafting Recipe:
![Milk Splash Crafting Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/vdaNwXu.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/W6RnHy2c86Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Permissions
- milksplash.*
  - Grants all permissions
- milksplash.brew
  - Grants the user the ability to brew milk potions
- milksplash.use
  - Grants the user the ability to use milk potions
- milksplash.craft
  - Grants the user the ability to craft milk potions

### Dependencies: 
- [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/) for permissions handling

### Any suggestions/bug reports?
- Please don't be afraid to send suggestion and/or bug reports my way! I'm willing to take constructive criticism as well! Thanks for taking a look at my plugin!
- Join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/aXpaYrmJA8) to contact me regarding this plugin/or any of my others!
